column1: # ZAP baseline rule overrides for Monize.
# Self-hosted deployments terminate HTTPS at a reverse proxy, so the e2e
# stack runs HTTP - silence the HTTPS-related alerts in CI. The proxy
# config is covered in our self-hosting docs, not enforced here.

column3: (Content Security Policy headers - validated by Lighthouse)
(Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens - we use double-submit cookie pattern; ZAP cannot see the cookie/header pair)
(Permissions-Policy header missing - acceptable for self-hosted; doc'd in security guide)
